chunks.title: Opening Invocation and Praise
chunks.reason: The chapter begins with a title followed by the bride's prayer for intimacy and mutual praise of love.

chunks.title: Bride's Self-Description and Search
chunks.reason: The bride describes her appearance and condition while asking the beloved for his location.

chunks.title: Exchange of Affirmations and Metaphors
chunks.reason: The beloved responds with instructions and comparisons, followed by the bride's poetic metaphors.

chunks.title: Mutual Praise of Beauty and Home
chunks.reason: The couple exchanges compliments on each other's beauty and describes their dwelling place.
